title: Minecraft Nomad
description: A vanilla+ modpack that will help you play out your nomadic dreams.
body:
**Minecraft Nomad is a Vanilla+ Modpack that adds quite a few quality of life and adventure mods.**

## Notable Features ##

- [Explorer's Camp](https://modrinth.com/mod/explorers-camp) helps create small campsites that pack and unpack themselves to take with you on your journeys.
- Horses and Donkeys won't drown in water and can run through leaves making them infinitely more useful.
- [Traveler's Backpack](https://modrinth.com/mod/travelersbackpack) for extra storage and sleeping bags.
- [NiftyCarts](https://modrinth.com/mod/niftycarts) to bring with you on your journeys
- A bunch of new structures and locations for you to explore.
- A bunch of quality of life mods.
- [JourneyMap](https://modrinth.com/mod/journeymap), a minimap mod for you to keep track of your travels.
- [Flashback](https://modrinth.com/mod/flashback) to get cool clips and shots of your playthrough.
- Removed Herobrine

### Some Gameplay Rules to Make It More Challenging
### 
1. no punching wood
2. no crafting armor above leather (you can wear any armor you find)
3. the only utility blocks allowed to be crafted and picked up are crafting tables, campfires, chests and smithing tables (other utility blocks can be used if found)
4. no crafting beds (sleeping bags are an exception)
5. cannot stay in the same place for longer than 3 days
6. no crafting tools above stone
7. the only ore you can smelt is copper
8. no farming
9. no placing chests on the ground

**None of the Mods or shaders in this modpack are my creations. Thanks to all of the amazing mod authors that created these mods
